title: hemionitis decursiva
intro: Hemionitis decursiva, also known as the fern-leaved holly fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Hemionitis decursiva can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures for topical and internal use.
